title: hieracium bifidum subsp. subtenuiflorum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. subtenuiflorum, also known as the Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hieracium bifidum subsp. subtenuiflorum are thought to include wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. It is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
